strict_goal.statement: Turn the current large puzzle set into one breakthrough preparation board: make the strongest progress, the weakest blockers, and the final critical path explicit.
strict_goal.boundary: This board is for preparation and diagnosis. It does not claim that final AGI breakthrough has been achieved.

puzzle_table.meaning: 决定我们是否真的有足够厚的真实结构证据来谈编码原理。
决定 basis / offset / contextual / protocol 这几条数学线是否已经成形。
决定系统候选定理能不能从参数理解推进到 exact closure。
决定非 Attention + 非 BP 路线是否真的具备放大潜力。
决定 SpikeICSPB 能否把稳定结构转成真实语言连续体。

top_blockers.name: family-to-specific exact closure 不足
top_blockers.why: specific 数学桥已强，但真实 held-out 的 exact family->specific 闭合仍未完成。

top_blockers.name: Spike 语言连续体过弱
top_blockers.why: 非 Attention + 非 BP 路线已能设计和扩展，但还不能给出强语言后继。

top_blockers.name: dense exact evidence 不足
top_blockers.why: row/signature 级证据已经强，但 dense neuron-level exact tensors 仍不足。

top_blockers.name: successor exact closure 不足
top_blockers.why: DNN 侧与 Spike 侧都显示 successor 仍然是当前最弱系统项。

critical_path: 提高 dense neuron-level exact evidence
同时打 family-to-specific exact closure 与 successor exact closure
把强化后的系统定理迁移到 scalable SpikeICSPB Phase-A 候选上
在 stronger dense export 与 unseen-family 条件下重测 theorem candidate

strict_verdict.core_answer: The project is no longer missing direction. The remaining problem is now concentrated into a small number of system bottlenecks: dense exact evidence, family-to-specific exact closure, successor exact closure, and Spike language continuation quality.
main_hard_gaps: the DNN side is stronger in parameter understanding than in exact closure
the Spike side is stronger in architecture and scaling than in language continuation quality
the final gap is now a system bottleneck problem, not a missing-concepts problem

next_large_blocks: 提高 dense neuron-level exact evidence
同时打 family-to-specific exact closure 与 successor exact closure
把强化后的系统定理迁移到 scalable SpikeICSPB Phase-A 候选上
在 stronger dense export 与 unseen-family 条件下重测 theorem candidate
